Hey all. I'm building a database of local card/comic/TCG shops around the country that I can use as sources for future PSA Magazine stories.

So, what are your favorite local card shops? Shoot me a reply/DM.

If you're an LCS owner and want to be added, same thing. Thanks!

hi, i make beaded spiders & suncatchers & am super broke this month. can’t work full time, can’t find part time work..I petsit but that’s not gonna cover my bills this month. handmade stuff is here - palmstreet.app/invites/aloe...
i sell plants too, those are on ebay - linktr.ee/aloehoarder

My Aloe ‘DZ’ before it decided to try & rot last year. It’s hanging out in one of the prop pots in the greenhouse, but it’ll be awhile before it looks this nice again.

‘DZ’ is often sold mislabeled by some nurseries as zebrina ‘Dannyz’ (or ‘Christmas Carol’.) It is a Karen Zimmerman hybrid.

#aloe

🔥 #PSA10 royalty indeed—this @Topps #tradingcard of #NolanRyan captures the man who turned 100‑mph heaters into folklore. With 5,714 Ks and a record 7 no‑hitters carved into MLB history, this slab feels like holding a piece of baseball mythology. tinyurl.com/2rsucm4c

10% off across our eBay and Amazon hauls, stacked with Beckett‑cert autos and PSA slabs for collectors who can smell a real drop before the crowd even blinks. Amazon hunters, your key is AAVLPCOX at checkout. eBay tinyurl.com/39mcnwhp Amazon tinyurl.com/4wdfm4ea

#CypressHill icon #BReal built a legacy on platinum hits, protest‑level energy, and a voice you can ID from a mile away, and this #autographed photo drop hits with that same unmistakable grit straight out of our vaults. eBay tinyurl.com/4u89t7h4 and Amazon tinyurl.com/m5386rxc

#CGC 9.8 heat on a #MarkSpears Monsters #5 — signed and sketched by Mark Spears himself, the artist who turns classic creature lore into museum‑grade nightmare fuel. A killer combo for any horror collector. eBay tinyurl.com/yudzc3yn Amazon tinyurl.com/36wvk8u6 Collectors Comics tinyurl.com/58skjh4p

This signed shot of #PetriHawkins, forever Bailiff Byrd on Judge Judy, carries the presence of the man who kept 25 seasons of courtroom chaos in check with one raised eyebrow and a perfectly timed quip, all authenticated by @beckettcollect. eBay tinyurl.com/44dendvz and Amazon tinyurl.com/3xtp5j76

Channeling full ’66 nostalgia—these #classic shots signed by #Batman66 standout #BurtWard bring back the era when Robin’s acrobatics, cliffhangers, and “Holy ___!” one‑liners helped turn the show into a pop‑culture time capsule. eBay tinyurl.com/3vc5t78a Amazon tinyurl.com/2cyh33cr

#PSA10 🔥 and pure baseball royalty—this @Topps #tradingcard of #BabeRuth spotlights the slugger who didn’t just crush 714 homers, he dragged the sport into the live‑ball era and made Yankee Stadium the “House That Ruth Built.”  tinyurl.com/4awxfatt

Ink with edge—this signed shot of #KatVonD channels the artist who turned LA Ink into appointment TV and built KVD Beauty into a global alt‑culture force, all authenticated by @beckettcollect and loaded with that unmistakable Von D flair. eBay tinyurl.com/2recznsj and Amazon tinyurl.com/4y427kpm

These shots signed by #MatHoffman lock in the era when the Condor was landing no‑handed 900s, inventing tricks mid‑air, and dragging BMX into the extreme‑sports spotlight with pure fearlessness. eBay tinyurl.com/4whukees and Amazon tinyurl.com/4vfn2rpz
#authentic #beckett

#PSA10 ice-cold perfection—this #UpperDeck rookie nails #AlexanderOvechkin at the moment he blasted into the NHL with 52 goals, a Calder Trophy, and a debut season that felt like a controlled explosion. The Great Eight didn’t just show up, he rewired the league. #tradingcard tinyurl.com/dabkutpk

Triple‑double royalty in cardboard form 👑 This PSA10 Panini #tradingcard of #NikolaJokic is as pristine as his league‑leading efficiency. The Joker’s 2023 Finals MVP and dual MVP run turn this slab into a stat‑sheet flex. tinyurl.com/ywba2sh8

10% off across our eBay and Amazon hauls, loaded with Beckett‑cert autos and PSA‑slabbed heat for collectors who spot a real drop before the room even twitches. Amazon hunters, your key is AAVLPCOX at checkout. eBay tinyurl.com/39mcnwhp Amazon tinyurl.com/4wdfm4ea

CGC 9.8 Vengeance of #Vampirella #6 signed by #AdamHughes — a killer combo from the artist who redefined modern pin‑up covers. eBay tinyurl.com/yxuh938u Amazon tinyurl.com/4au8x6am Collectors Comics tinyurl.com/yhxk7nzs

Crank the amps—this high‑voltage stash of #autographed shots captures #GeoffTate in full command, the #Queensryche icon whose four‑octave power reshaped progressive metal 🎤 eBay buff.ly/40sdM2x and Amazon buff.ly/4jnjdbV
#rocklegend #authentic #beckett

Gem Mint glory for the king of speed 👑 This PSA10 Topps #tradingcard of #MaxVerstappen isn’t just graded—it’s a milestone. With 60+ career wins and three world titles, this slab is straight podium physics. tinyurl.com/36re7yps

Coming out Tuesday, 2/24, a brand new set of Disney trading cards featuring illustrations by me, Bobby Timony! This set includes classic characters from Winnie the Pooh, Alice in Wonderland, and Peter Pan! I hope you enjoy colle these cards as much as I enjoyed drawing them! Thank you!

I drew a set of Great Mouse Detective collectible cards, and they’re out today!
Released on the Topps Disney Collect app, these cards feature your favorite characters from the animated classic, the Great Mouse Detective, with art by Bobby Timony! (Thats me!)

play.toppsapps.com/app/disney-c...

Every year I try to do something really nice for the Heroes Art Auction. The Heroes Covention is a comics show that’s welcomed and supported me for well over a decade now, and I’m always happy to give back with a new auction piece.
